records.question: Which mountains named Taska n'Zat are exactly 3912.0 meters high with prominence at most 460.0 and have photos named life in RBG taken using a Sigma 19mm f2.8 EX DN lens with focal length 19.0 and max aperture at least 2.8?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
JOIN camera_lens ON photos.camera_lens_id = camera_lens.id
WHERE camera_lens.max_aperture >= 2.8 AND camera_lens.name = 'Sigma 19mm f2.8 EX DN' AND camera_lens.focal_length_mm = 19.0 AND mountain.height = 3912.0 AND mountain.name = 'Taska n’Zat' AND mountain.prominence <= 460.0 AND photos.name = 'life' AND photos.color = 'RBG'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN photos AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.mountain_id INNER JOIN camera_lens AS T3 ON T2.camera_lens_id = T3.id WHERE T1.name = 'Taska n''Zat' AND T1.Height = 3912.0 AND T1.Prominence <= 460.0 AND T2.name = 'life in RBG' AND T3.name = 'Sigma 19mm f2.8 EX DN' AND T3.focal_length_mm = 19.0 AND T3.max_aperture >= 2.8

records.question: Which mountains in the Guna Massif have a height of exactly 4120.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
WHERE mountain.height = 4120.0 AND mountain.range = 'Guna Massif'
records.pred_sql: SELECT id FROM mountain WHERE Range = 'Guna Massif' AND Height = 4120.0

records.question: Which mountains in the Kollo Massif have a prominence of at most 350.0 and are featured in photos named rabbits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
JOIN camera_lens ON photos.camera_lens_id = camera_lens.id
WHERE mountain.range = 'Kollo Massif' AND mountain.prominence <= 350.0 AND photos.name = 'rabbits'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN photos AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.mountain_id WHERE T1.Range = 'Kollo Massif' AND T1.Prominence <= 350.0 AND T2.name = 'rabbits'

records.question: Which mountains named Ouanoukrim in Morocco's Toubkal Atlas have a height of 4088.0, a prominence of at least 420.0, and photos named grass in RBG color?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
WHERE mountain.range = 'Toubkal Atlas' AND photos.name = 'grass' AND mountain.name = 'Ouanoukrim' AND mountain.country = 'Morocco' AND mountain.prominence >= 420.0 AND photos.color = 'RBG' AND mountain.height = 4088.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM mountain AS T1 INNER JOIN photos AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.mountain_id WHERE T1.name = 'Ouanoukrim' AND T1.Country = 'Morocco' AND T1.Range = 'Toubkal Atlas' AND T1.Height = 4088.0 AND T1.Prominence >= 420.0 AND T2.name = 'grass' AND T2.color = 'RBG'

records.question: Which mountains named Mount Cameroon are located in Cameroon and have photos associated with them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT mountain.id FROM mountain
JOIN photos ON mountain.id = photos.mountain_id
WHERE mountain.country = 'Cameroon' AND mountain.name = 'Mount Cameroon'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.id FROM mountain AS T1 JOIN photos AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.mountain_id WHERE T1.name = 'Mount Cameroon' AND T1.Country = 'Cameroon'
